title: Flamingo: A Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
description: DeepMind introduced Flamingo, a visual language model that can rapidly adapt to new tasks with just a few examples (few-shot learning). It combines pretrained vision and language models with new architecture components, achieving state-of-the-art on image and video understanding benchmarks without task-specific fine-tuning. Showed the power of frozen pretrained models with light-weight adapters.
